_comment: Phase-6 vision supply-chain license inventory — exact pins, no placeholders. Committed so the licensing posture of the visual analyzer is reviewable in-repo; the SBOM CI step regenerates dependency lists and compares (it never commits). The YuNet model file is committed at worker/models/face_detection_yunet_2023mar.onnx; its identity is pinned in worker/models/vision.manifest.json.

entries.name: YuNet face detection model (face_detection_yunet_2023mar.onnx)
entries.notes: Per-model LICENSE file in the opencv_zoo model directory. Artifact sha256 equals the repository's Git-LFS pointer oid at the pinned ref (two independent sources agree).

entries.name: opencv-python-headless (Python wrapper package)
entries.notes: The opencv-python packaging project itself is MIT.

entries.name: FFmpeg (shared libraries bundled inside the manylinux wheel)
entries.notes: The opencv-python manylinux wheels bundle an LGPL build of FFmpeg plus its dependency libraries (see the opencv-python README license section). Dynamically linked; no static LGPL linkage in TwinAI code.

entries.name: libvpx / libwebp / zlib / libpng / libjpeg-turbo / openjpeg / libtiff (bundled codec/support libs)
entries.license: BSD-3-Clause / BSD-3-Clause / Zlib / libpng-2.0 / IJG+BSD / BSD-2-Clause / libtiff
entries.notes: Bundled inside the manylinux wheel per the opencv-python third-party inventory; permissive licenses, attribution preserved in the wheel's license files.
